name: t3code-vscode
description: Run T3 Code (pingdotgg/t3code) — a GUI for coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode) — inside VS Code.

commands.title: T3 Code: Open in External Browser

t3code.command.description: Custom command to launch the T3 Code server (e.g. "t3" or "npx -y t3@latest"). Leave empty (recommended) to use the extension-managed install, which includes a web client patched to work behind path-based port proxies (code-server/Coder).

t3code.port.description: Port for the T3 Code server. A fixed port keeps port-forwarding stable; 0 lets t3 pick a free port.

enumDescriptions: Route through VS Code's port forwarding (asExternalUri). Falls back to guidance if the environment uses a path-based proxy that breaks the t3 UI.
Point the panel directly at http://localhost:<port>. Use when you forward the port to your local machine yourself (e.g. `coder port-forward` or `ssh -L`).
t3code.accessMode.description: How the T3 Code panel reaches the server.

t3code.stopServerOnExit.description: Stop the T3 Code server when VS Code (or the extension) shuts down.
